==Minion Sim==
[[File:Wargame Simulation.png|150px|left]]
The Minion Sim is a place for you to test and compete with your Minions every week. It's unlocked by purchasing it at [[Club#Star_Coins|Club Shop]] for 1k Star Coins.

===Sim Value Packs===
[[Value_Packs#Sim_Value_Pack|Sim Value Packs]] can be purchased after certain milestones are met.

{{Clear}}

==Sim Core==
The portion of the Minion Sim that lets you upgrade your Minion Sim.

===Algorithm Center===
This place allows you to upgrade your Minion Sims and spend Log Fragments.

====Sim Core====
Upgrades for all your Minions across all Sims.

The bonuses from each level can be calculated the same way.
{| class="wikitable"
!Level
!Troop HP
!Troop ATK
!Troop DEF
!Troop RUSH
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Basic Data Unit}}s
|-
|Level Number aka LVL||1,000 * LVL||100 * LVL||100 * LVL||100 * LVL||Level == 0: Free<br>Level == 1: 22<br>Level > 1: (Cost of LVL-1) + (If LVL is even LVL, else if LVL is odd LVL-1)
|}

The first 100 levels are available below as an example.
{| class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!Level
!Troop HP
!Troop ATK
!Troop DEF
!Troop RUSH
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Basic Data Unit}}s
|-
|1||1k||100||100||100||Free
|-
|2||2k||200||200||200||22
|-
|3||3k||300||300||300||24
|-
|4||4k||400||400||400||28
|-
|5||5k||500||500||500||32
|-
|6||6k||600||600||600||38
|-
|7||7k||700||700||700||44
|-
|8||8k||800||800||800||52
|-
|9||9k||900||900||900||60
|-

|100||100k||10k||10k||10k||5,020
|}

===Species Data Calculations===
When you finish a Tactical Log, you can still get more fragments for it. Extra fragments can be spent under their species for extra benefits. There's no other use for extra fragments at this time so it's advised to use all of them here.

* {{Retext|Blue Fragments|blue}} are worth 100 points per fragment.
* {{Retext|Purple Fragments|purple}} are worth 100 points per fragment.
* {{Retext|Orange Fragments|orange}} are worth 100 points per fragment.

{{Retext|Purple Fragments|purple}} and {{Retext|Orange Fragments|orange}} are worth the same as {{Retext|Blue Fragments|blue}}, however, you receive more {{Retext|Purple Fragments|purple}} and {{Retext|Orange Fragments|orange}} when you gain them.

====Dung Beetles Data Calculations====
All extra Dung Beetle Fragments can be spent here for extra benefits.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Cost
!Sim Core Base Effect
!In Minion Sim, all Minion ATK
!In Minion Sim, Troop DMG to Dung Beetles
!In Minion Sims:<br>> Troop RUSH DMG to Dung Beetles
|-
|0||0||+0%||+0%||+0%||+0%
|-
|1||10k||+0.2%||+0.2%||+0.2%||+0.2%
|-
|2||10k||+0.4%||+0.4%||+0.4%||+0.4%

====Goldfishes Data Calculations====
All extra Goldfish Fragments can be spent here for extra benefits.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Cost
!Sim Core Base Effect
!In Minion Sim, all Minion HP
!In Minion Sim, Troop DMG to Goldfish
!In Minion Sims:<br>> Troop RUSH DMG to Goldfish

All extra Surf Clam Fragments can be spent here for extra benefits.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Cost
!Sim Core Base Effect
!In Minion Sim, all Minion DEF
!In Minion Sim, Troop DMG to Surf Clams

===Log Loading===

<tabber>
|-|Common Log Rewards=
[[File:Common Record.png|frameless|75x75px|left]]
{{RewardRowHeader}}
!rowspan="8"|
{{RewardRow|Engineer|blue|6.67|Grenadier|blue|6.67|Military Cook|blue|6.67|Dressed Warrior|blue|6.67}}
{{RewardRow|Sword Witch|blue|6.67|Umibozu|blue|6.67|Ice Wizard|blue|6.67|Ice Element Scholar|blue|6.67}}
{{RewardRow|Ice Lancer|blue|6.67|Executive Officer|blue|6.67|Trading Officer|blue|6.67|Security Officer|blue|6.67}}
{{RewardRow|Strongmantis|blue|6.67|Bladesman|blue|6.67|Immortal Swordsman|blue|6.67|}}
|}

|-|Rare Log Rewards=
[[File:Rare Record.png|frameless|75x75px|left]]
{{RewardRowHeader}}
!rowspan="10"|
{{RewardRow|D B Logistics Chief|purple|5|D B Vanguard Capt|purple|5|D B Military Chef|purple|5|D B Blasting Capt|purple|5}}
{{RewardRow|Odachi 1st Disciple|purple|5|Shingyoto 1st Disciple|purple|5|Head of Muto|purple|5|Dualblade Swordfish|purple|5}}
{{RewardRow|Senior Ice Scholar|purple|5|Icehammer Warrior|purple|5|Magic Mentor|purple|5|Icefield Familiar|purple|5}}
{{RewardRow|Security Team Leader|purple|5|Fund Manager|purple|5|Project Salesman|purple|5|Legal Specialist|purple|5}}
{{RewardRow|Golden Blade Disciple|purple|5|Divine Fist Disciple|purple|5|Disciple of Iron Fork|purple|5|Mt Wu Sect Disciple|purple|5}}
|}

|-|Precious Log Rewards=
[[File:Precious Record.png|frameless|75x75px|left]]
{{RewardRowHeader}}
!rowspan="30"|
{{RewardRow|Chief General Witte|orange|0.91|Sergeant Jurgen|orange|0.91|Logistics Officer Uman|orange|1.83|Military Scientist|orange|1.83}}
{{RewardRow|Senator Marius|orange|1.83|Priest School Director|orange|1.83|Blade SWAT Team|orange|1.83|Chief's Guard|orange|1.83}}
{{RewardRow|Marshal Halder|orange|1.83|Engineer CDR Reinhardt|orange|1.83|Intel. Director Sorge|orange|1.83|Mech Captain Schaul|orange|1.83}}
{{RewardRow|Politician Kenshin|orange|0.91|Samurai Gen. Kiyomasa|orange|0.91|Lady Nohime|orange|1.83|Shinpan Ujizane|orange|1.83}}
{{RewardRow|Fudai Keiji|orange|1.83|Grand Elder Naomasa|orange|1.83|Iga Leader Hanzo|orange|1.83|Kendo Master Jubei|orange|1.83}}

===Tactical Log===

{|class= "wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |Name
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |Tactic 1<br>10 Fragments

!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |Tactic 3<br>10 Fragments

|-
!colspan="8" |Dung Beetles
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Engineer|blue}}||'''TECH Booster I'''<br>Snail TECH +10||'''DEF Booster I'''<br>Snail DEF +10||'''Tactical Deterrence'''<br>In Minion Sims, enemy DEF -100

</tabber>

==Sim Shop==
The Sim Shop has items for sale for Sim Tokens that rotate on a weekly basis. You can see a history of Fragments that were sold on the [[Weekly_Events_History#Sim_Shop_Weekly_Fragments|Weekly Events History]] page.

{{ShopRowHeader|Sim Shop|Sim Token}}
!rowspan="6"|Tactic<br>Fragments
{{ShopRow|Wildhammer (Tactical Log), +40<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset|orange|3k|Titanium Serg Major, +40<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset<br>Only available after all<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wildhammer (Tactical Log)|orange}} fragments<br>are purchased|orange|3k|Fire Bat, +40<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset<br>Only available after all<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Titanium Serg Major|orange}} fragments<br>are purchased|orange|3k}}
{{ShopRow|Sim Log Choice Pack II, <br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset<br>Only available after all<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fire Bat|orange}} fragments<br>are purchased|orange|3k|Sim Log Choice Pack I, <br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset<br>Only available after all<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fire Bat|orange}} fragments<br>are purchased|orange|3k}}
{{ShopRow|Weekly Minion Sim Fragment 1, +40<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset|orange|6k|Weekly Minion Sim Fragment 2, +40<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset|orange|6k}}
!rowspan="4"|Currency
{{ShopRow|Unknown Record, +3<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset|orange|1.5k|Gene Speedup, +10h<br>Purchase 3 Times Per Reset|white|800|Clone Speedup, +10h<br>Purchase 3 Times Per Reset|white|800}}
{{ShopRow|B-Tads, +50k<br>Purchase 1 Time Per Reset|white|800|Current Species War Chest, +100<br>Purchase 3 Times Per Reset|white|500|Basic Data Unit, +200|white|100}}
!rowspan="4"|Gear
{{ShopRow|Disk of Regeneration, <br>Purchase Limit 1|blue|15k|N377 Tool Kit, <br>Purchase Limit 1|orange|600|White Oaken Shield, <br>Purchase Limit 1<br>Only available after<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Disk of Regeneration|blue}}<br>is purchased.|blue|15k}}
{{ShopRow|Trumpet Shell, <br>Purchase Limit 1<br>Only available after<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|White Oaken Shield|blue}}<br>is purchased.|purple|30k|Sanskrit Tablet, <br>Purchase Limit 1<br>Only available after<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Trumpet Shell|purple}}<br>is purchased.|orange|60k}}
|}

[[Category:Minion Sim]]
